resolved_during_smoke.issue: Workflows service agent did not exist immediately after API enablement.
resolved_during_smoke.resolution: Created the service identity with gcloud beta services identity create --service=workflows.googleapis.com.

resolved_during_smoke.issue: Workflow runtime service account initially lacked BigQuery permissions.
resolved_during_smoke.resolution: Granted BigQuery job and data edit roles to the workflow runtime service account for the smoke project.

resolved_during_smoke.issue: Wrapped YAML strings inserted stray backslash continuations into BigQuery SQL.
resolved_during_smoke.resolution: Disabled YAML wrapping for generated Workflows YAML and added a regression check.

resolved_during_smoke.issue: Folded multiline SQL made SQL comments swallow quality queries.
resolved_during_smoke.resolution: Emitted multiline workflow strings as YAML literal block scalars.

resolved_during_smoke.issue: BigQuery jobs.get polling returned not found without job location.
resolved_during_smoke.resolution: Passed jobReference.location from jobs.insert to jobs.get.

remaining_review_boundary: This historical smoke proved generated-runner deployment, execution, BigQuery polling and target/evidence-table readback. GCP-BQ-15C is now closed by docs/reports/gcp-workflows-certified-runner-smoke.json.
commands: uv run python -m contractforge_gcp.cli deploy-project .tmp/gcp-workflows-smoke/project.yaml --environment-key gcp --dry-run --output-dir .tmp/gcp-workflows-smoke/bundle --summary-only
